validation_pass_rate: 843/843 full-suite PASS (includes 36 SESSION-042 PhaseState tests + 15 SESSION-042 evolution loop tests + all prior tests)

commercial_benchmark._MANDATORY: Every upgrade MUST be measured against COMMERCIAL_BENCHMARK.md. If it does not shrink a gap below, it is cosmetic.
commercial_benchmark.fundamental_blocker: PARTIALLY RESOLVED THROUGH SESSION-032: the original WFC/shader/export break is now closed by a lightweight PDG runtime and a USD-like scene contract. The main remaining blockers are industrial runtime depth (cache/partition/layering), benchmarked asset production, visual quality, and the simulation-conditioned neural-render bridge.

strategic_paths.path_a_physics_motion_engine: SESSION-036 established the UMR data bus; SESSION-037 upgraded jump/fall/hit into native transient phases; SESSION-038 refined those with target/contact/window metadata and critically damped hit recovery; SESSION-039 added inertialized transition synthesis (Bollo quintic + Holden dead blending) and runtime motion matching query (Clavet GDC 2016). State transitions now use a two-stage pipeline: query optimal entry frame then inertialize. Layer 3 runs 12 tests with transition quality feedback.
strategic_paths.path_b_ai_visual_polish: Now better conditioned by anatomically valid low-dimensional motion data; next step is ControlNet / diffusion export from the distilled body and pose representation.
strategic_paths.path_c_architecture_closure: SESSION-032 delivered lightweight PDG + USD-like scene description; SESSION-036 added UMR architecture closure; SESSION-037 removed the largest action-state bypass; SESSION-038 hardened the contract with refined metadata; SESSION-039 closed the runtime transition synthesis gap with inertialized blending and motion matching query; SESSION-040 closed the CLI/exporter bus propagation gap with pipeline contract enforcement (UMR_Context, PipelineContractGuard, UMR_Auditor SHA-256 seal, ContractEvolutionBridge); SESSION-041 closed Gap 3 (end-to-end reproducibility) with headless E2E CI, SSIM visual regression, golden baselines, and VisualRegressionEvolutionBridge; SESSION-042 closed Gap 1 (aperiodic motion integration) with PhaseState dataclass, Gate Mechanism, and Three-Layer Evolution Loop. Next step: Gap 2 (XPBD rigid/soft body coupling), terrain-aware sensing, gait transition blending, production benchmark suite.

current_focus: SESSION-042 closes Gap 1 (Aperiodic Motion Integration) with PhaseState dataclass and Gate Mechanism in PhaseDrivenAnimator.generate_frame(). Research: Local Motion Phases (Starke 2020), DeepPhase (Starke 2022). Three-Layer Evolution Loop (evolution_loop.py) established for self-evolving architecture. 843/843 tests PASS, zero regressions. Next: Gap 2 (Rigid Body/Soft Body Coupling via XPBD).

trigger_when: The user explicitly asks for precise, parallel, global, or comprehensive research
A subsystem upgrade is blocked by missing external knowledge
The session risks becoming superficial, repetitive, or formal without new ideas
A multi-session gap needs stronger benchmarks, implementation references, or production standards

explicit_trigger_phrases.standard: 启动精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.gap_focused: 围绕当前最大差距做去重并行搜索
explicit_trigger_phrases.feature_focused: 针对这个功能做精准并行参考全网信息
explicit_trigger_phrases.anti_drift: 如果你判断当前升级可能流于形式，立即启动研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.research_first: 先按研究协议补足参考，再开始实现
explicit_trigger_phrases.dedup_focused: 按去重机制并行搜索，不要重复已有资料
explicit_trigger_phrases.landing_focused: 只收集能直接指导项目落地实现的资料
explicit_trigger_phrases.soft_trigger: 优先启用精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.hard_trigger: 本轮禁止直接开做，必须先启动精准并行研究协议
explicit_trigger_phrases.deep_reading: 这篇论文/这个仓库是指路明灯，认真研读每一个细节
explicit_trigger_phrases.full_standard_command: 启动精准并行研究协议：围绕当前差距做去重并行搜索，只保留能直接指导 MarioTrickster-MathArt 落地升级的高价值资料。

research_trigger_policy.deep_reading_trigger_rule: When the user names a specific paper, repo, or documentation as the primary reference (e.g., 'this paper is your guiding light'), MUST switch from parallel scanning to Deep Reading Protocol. Parallel discovery finds WHAT to build; Deep Reading finds HOW to build it. Never skip Deep Reading for North Star sources.
research_trigger_policy.phrase_interpretation_rule: Close paraphrases should count as valid triggers when the intent is clearly precise, parallel, dedup-aware, implementation-relevant research.
stop_when: Two or more strong sources support the same practical conclusion
New results are mostly duplicates or weaker restatements
The next code change is already clear
The bottleneck is engineering rather than missing knowledge

pending_tasks.title: Metabolic Engine: ATP/Lactate Fatigue Model
pending_tasks.description: Research-driven: ATP consumption + lactate accumulation math model (Hill-type muscle, Michaelis-Menten kinetics). When lactate threshold exceeded, reduce joint max torque → motion becomes heavy/staggering. Output body temperature parameter for ControlNet conditioning (flushed skin, sweat highlights in ComfyUI).
masters: Scott Delp (Stanford, OpenSim founder, musculoskeletal + biochemical simulation)
search_keywords: Metabolic Energy Cost in Character Animation

pending_tasks.title: MPM & Phase Change Simulation
pending_tasks.description: Research-driven: Material Point Method for terrain interaction — snow compaction/melting, mud drying/hardening (solid↔liquid phase change). Compute material state as 2D mask for ComfyUI (wet/dry regions, deformation footprints).
masters: Chenfanfu Jiang (UCLA, Hollywood MPM for snow/mud/fluid VFX)
search_keywords: Differentiable Material Point Method (MPM) for Phase Change

pending_tasks.title: Reaction-Diffusion & Thermodynamics for Surface Chemistry
pending_tasks.description: Research-driven: Turing patterns / Navier-Stokes for chemical texture evolution — rust on armor (acid rain), fire spread on cloth, poison diffusion on skin. Output texture evolution maps as diffusion model guidance. Supersedes P2-3 (basic reaction-diffusion) with full thermodynamics.
masters: Ron Fedkiw (Stanford, ILM, Oscar winner — fluid mechanics + combustion VFX)
Nils Thuerey (TUM — deep learning + complex physics/fluid simulation)

recent_audit.summary: SESSION-036 closed the motion-data architecture gap by introducing a Unified Motion Representation (UMR) inspired by OpenUSD UsdSkel, Houdini KineFX, and Unreal AnimGraph layering. UnifiedMotionFrame now forces time/phase/root/joint/contact fields through the trunk. AssetPipeline produces per-state .umr.json clips, manifest-level motion_contract metadata, and ordered audit trails. AnglePoseProjector and BiomechanicsProjector now operate as single-direction frame filters with strict layer guards; Layer 3 can read UMR context directly. Real export audit passed on idle/run/jump, compileall passed, and 73 targeted regression tests passed. Main remaining gaps: native phase-driven jump/fall/hit, non-bypass CLI/export entrypoints, and runtime UMR query/transition synthesis.

session_038_changes.summary: SESSION-038 hardened the non-cyclic transient phase model inside the UMR trunk. Jump/fall keep distance-driven semantics but now export richer target/contact/window metadata; hit is upgraded from simple decay to an explicit critically damped recovery variable with half-life, velocity, and progress semantics. Layer 3 now consumes these refined fields directly, targeted regression passed 6/6, and a real jump/fall/hit export audit confirmed the metadata survives the full production path.
